feed.title: SkillsLLM

author.name: SkillsLLM & the MCP / Claude Skills ecosystem

feed.subtitle: AI tooling news and guides: SkillsLLM, Desktop Commander, Model Context Protocol, FastMCP, ClaudePluginHub, MCP Servers blog, and Claude Skills Hub

entry.title: claude-commands
entry.content: LLM Capital Efficiency Framework: 145+ production-tested slash commands for autonomous development workflows, PR automation, and multi-agent orchestration

entry.title: last30days
entry.content: Research any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Hacker News, Polymarket, GitHub, and 5+ more sources. AI agent scores by upvotes, likes, and real money - not editors.

entry.title: silver-bullet
entry.content: Agentic Process Orchestrator for AI-native Software Engineering & DevOps. Provides SB-owned lifecycle workflows, optional extension-plugin boundaries, and layered technical compliance.

entry.title: arc
entry.content: The full arc from idea to shipped code. Lifecycle workflows for vision, ideation, implementation, review, testing, audit, launch, and commits.

entry.title: looker
entry.content: Connect to Looker and interact with your data using LookML.

entry.title: quality-strategy
entry.content: Produce and use a software quality strategy — who matters, what they value, where you're exposed, and what to do about it — plus the test and tooling strategies that operationalise it, and shareable visual artefacts generated from it. Grounded in the Tollens quality framework.

entry.title: learnship
entry.content: Agentic engineering done right — 57 structured workflows, 17 specialist agent personas, persistent memory across sessions, integrated learning partner, and impeccable UI design system. Works with Claude Code, Windsurf, Cursor, Gemini CLI, OpenCode, and Codex.

entry.title: song2html-claude-plugin
entry.content: Read, write, parse, validate, transpose, and render song chord charts using the song2html format.

entry.title: micropython
entry.content: A plugin to interact with MicroPython devices within Claude

entry.title: open-skilled-sdd
entry.content: Open Spec-driven development workflow for Claude Code: OpenSpec, PRPs, Spec Kit, spec-workflow-mcp, BMad-Method, 6A workflow.

entry.title: agentic-senior-core
entry.content: Universal AI coding rules. Write code like a staff engineer.

entry.title: harness-trace
entry.content: Agent behavior recording layer for Claude Code — local-first JSONL, side-effect only, uploads to team backend

entry.title: ccmem
entry.content: Claude Code Memory System - File-based learning and memory management

entry.title: plumbline
entry.content: Code that runs true under agentic maintenance

entry.title: sentinel-governance
entry.content: Sentinel - Governance rules enforcement plugin for Claude Code. Syncs organizational coding standards and policies into your Claude Code sessions.

entry.title: watchmen
entry.content: Surface skill suggestions + workspace context from watchmen sessions intelligence into your Claude Code sessions

entry.title: claudemux
entry.content: Multi-repo Claude Code orchestrator. Run one dispatcher session in the parent of your repos; spawn, message, and wait on tmux teammates across them — all from one place.

entry.title: harmony
entry.content: Declarative config for Claude Code. One manifest, full lifecycle (install + uninstall), per-Mac reconciliation.

entry.title: mitable
entry.content: Customer, product, and operating context for Forward Deployed Engineers — automatically maintained, automatically loaded.

entry.title: nativeui
entry.content: Author native iOS + Android apps with NativeUI: generate plain HTML/CSS, import it to a NativeUI project, export native screens, and wire backend through the NuiBackend interface without touching generated UI.

entry.title: career-ops
entry.content: AI job search command center: evaluate offers, generate CVs, scan portals, track applications. Uses your local Claude Code subscription.

entry.title: claude-handoff
entry.content: Continue the same Claude Code session across two machines: sync the transcript with Syncthing, then resume it on the other machine with one command.

entry.title: claude-automemory
entry.content: Persistent session recall for Claude Code: orient, search, list, show transcripts via stdlib Python + SessionStart hook

entry.title: agentsource-plugin
entry.content: B2B prospecting via the AgentSource API — find companies/prospects, enrich with firmographics/contacts, track business events, export to CSV at scale.

entry.title: fleet
entry.content: AWS services monitor and interaction plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: project-brain
entry.content: A professional OpenClaude project-brain plugin with six-layer persistent knowledge architecture, retrieval routing, self-correction scanning, knowledge compression, Obsidian vault sync, and measurable brain health metrics.

entry.title: relay
entry.content: Cross-project issue routing and work handoff between sessions, tools, and people

entry.title: flevinsky-ai
entry.content: Declare, run, and observe long-running dev services across Claude Code, Pi, and other agents

entry.title: dude
entry.content: Ultra-minimal RAG and cross-project memory for Claude CLI

entry.title: hello-world
entry.content: Exhaustive reference plugin exercising every Claude Code plugin feature: hooks, skills, commands, agents, MCP servers, bin executables, and background monitors. Every component logs to /tmp/hello-world-plugin.log for easy debugging.

entry.title: hald
entry.content: Your codebase, held. GraphRAG-powered codebase intelligence for git repositories. Ask questions about architectural decisions, find domain experts, trace code evolution, and surface hidden coupling.

entry.title: nanostack
entry.content: Minimal AI coding agent team skills for the full engineering workflow: think, plan, review, test, audit, ship

entry.title: phoenix-otel
entry.content: Export Claude Code session traces to Phoenix (Arize) via OpenTelemetry

entry.title: specular
entry.content: Agent-driven development workflow with Linear as the source of truth: specify, plan, and run an autonomous implement loop.

entry.title: e2e-runner
entry.content: JSON-driven E2E browser test runner — no JavaScript test files needed. Parallel execution against a Chrome pool (browserless, CDP, Lightpanda, Obscura, Steel), 28+ built-in actions, visual verification, network debugging, flaky test detection, reusable modules, and a real-time dashboard. Includes 3 specialized agents, 4 slash commands, and 17 MCP tools.

entry.title: gr
entry.content: Claude Code plugin for video analysis, deep research, content extraction, web search, and explainer video creation — powered by Gemini 3.5 Flash.

entry.title: librarian
entry.content: Navigate the Claude Code plugin ecosystem with awareness before install

entry.title: stitch-kit
entry.content: Design superpowers for Claude Code — 35 skills that teach your agent to ideate, research, generate, iterate, and ship beautiful UIs using Google Stitch MCP.

entry.title: hs
entry.content: Pre-execution safety layer that blocks dangerous shell commands and credential file reads using pattern matching + LLM analysis. Fail-closed design.

entry.title: rig-wiki
entry.content: Rig skill for `rig wiki` knowledge-base operations.

entry.title: lisa
entry.content: LLM-powered epic workflows. Spec, research, plan, then execute with fresh sub-agents per phase. Like Ralph, but smarter.

entry.title: forma
entry.content: Design Intelligence Framework. Multi-agent design reasoning with 67 UI styles, 161 color palettes, 57 font pairings, 163 industry profiles, 10 psychology triggers, 20 component blueprints, and W3C design token output. Actions: plan, build, create, design, implement, review, fix, improve, optimize, enhance, refactor, check UI/UX code. Projects: website, landing page, dashboard, admin panel, e-commerce, SaaS, portfolio, blog, mobile app. Elements: button, modal, navbar, sidebar, card, table, form, chart. Styles: glassmorphism, claymorphism, minimalism, brutalism, neumorphism, bento grid, dark mode, responsive, skeuomorphism, flat design. Topics: color palette, accessibility, animation, layout, typography, font pairing, spacing, hover, shadow, gradient, design system, design tokens.

entry.title: lanework
entry.content: Drive your .agents/reviews Kanban board through an AI-Driven Development Lifecycle — create review checklists, tick decisions, and advance status — backed by the lanework MCP server.

entry.title: superpowers
entry.content: Core skills library for Claude Code: TDD, debugging, collaboration patterns, and proven techniques

entry.title: bsession
entry.content: Drive the bsession headed-browser engine over HTTP; build Cloudflare/CAPTCHA-aware browser skills.

entry.title: promptup
entry.content: AI coding skill evaluator — 11-dimension session scoring, decision tracking, PR reports

entry.title: vibebreak
entry.content: Lock your AI sessions every N tokens until you move. Phone counts reps and posts a BeReal-style snap to your friends.

entry.title: claudetalk
entry.content: Inter-Claude messaging over MCP — also exposes the claude/channel capability so peer messages push into your session in real time (no hook polling).

entry.title: ultraswarm
entry.content: Durable multi-worker coding orchestration with supervised CLIs, metric routing, transactional integration, recovery, and explicit approvals.

entry.title: radar
entry.content: AI workflow intelligence — analyzes your coding sessions, scans the ecosystem, and recommends improvements relevant to you.

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,358 supported skills.

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,427 supported skills.

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Universal agentic skill library for Claude Code with 1,254+ reusable skills across coding, security, design, product, and operations workflows.

entry.title: mac-security-suite
entry.content: Read-only, on-demand macOS security harness — scan, egress firewall (LuLu), persistence diffing (KnockKnock), malware triage (ClamAV/YARA/capa/VirusTotal), and hardening audit (Lynis/mSCP). Baseline-and-diff, no resident daemons, no self-surveillance.

entry.title: grok-build
entry.content: Run the Grok Build CLI (xAI) as a collaborating AI inside Claude Code, with intelligent model routing across the SDLC. Claude conducts — requirements, architecture, the hard 20%, verification, review — and routes deterministic, high-volume work (scaffolding, tests, first-pass review, migrations, live web/X search) to Grok. Hybrid agentic engineering; lower token cost as a financial lever.

entry.title: assistant-burst-summary-hook
entry.content: Claude Code hooks that summarize quiet Telegram assistant bursts after voice notes.

entry.title: bonsai
entry.content: Worktree lifecycle as a cross-platform CLI: create a worktree + branch off the freshest default, set it up from a .bonsai file list, and tear it down behind a hard safety gate that keeps non-integrated work and warns on orphaned commits or interference. Skills: bonsai (create+setup), setup, prune.

entry.title: feature-loop
entry.content: Autonomous build → verify → fix loop on top of the agent-skills plugin.

entry.title: netwatch
entry.content: Cyberpunk-themed tmux agent dashboard — tracks Claude Code session state via hooks and exposes it through a daemon + Textual HUD

entry.title: tmux-pilot
entry.content: Control interactive CLI programs through tmux panes with intelligent output monitoring

entry.title: reflection-cc
entry.content: Re-prompts Claude Code when it stops prematurely — catches PERMISSION-SEEKING, STOPPED-WITH-TODOS, and FALSE-COMPLETE failure modes, and injects targeted recovery instructions.

entry.title: macos-dev
entry.content: macOS app development with SwiftUI and AppKit, including Liquid Glass adoption, framework interop, and the 2025/2026 design system. Bundles curated Apple Developer documentation.

entry.title: rtk-plugin
entry.content: Transparent token compression for Claude Code shell calls. Wraps RTK with lazy binary download and adds verticals RTK does not cover (Terraform, etc.).

entry.title: cuckoo
entry.content: Durable personal calendar for Claude Code — date/time reminders that resurface at your next session on/after the due date.

entry.title: unanet
entry.content: Automate Unanet timesheet entry via Playwright and Okta SSO with 1Password credentials

entry.title: oh-my-team
entry.content: Multi-agent orchestration for Claude Code. 12 specialized agents working in parallel — planning, building, reviewing, debugging. Plus a Hub for always-alive multi-project sessions controllable from Telegram or Slack.

entry.title: intervision
entry.content: Bring another coding agent in as a peer to review work just done or just discussed. Claude hands work to Codex; Codex hands work to Claude. Intervision is peer consultation among equals, not supervision from above.

entry.title: jj-claude-plugin
entry.content: Claude Code plugin for Jujutsu — HUD status line, jj workflows, and optional SPR stacked PR support

entry.title: agent-completion-chime
entry.content: Make a sound when AI agents finish. Per-agent chime on Stop / SubagentStop, all-complete chime when the active-agent set drains. Configurable via 9 MCP tools (chime_status, chime_list_sounds, chime_set_per_agent_sound, chime_set_all_complete_sound, chime_set_volume, chime_enable, chime_disable, chime_test, chime_reset_active). macOS only.

entry.title: ledger
entry.content: Execution as Proof for money — the deterministic correctness layer AI agents call. Exact Money.from (no floats), kernel-enforced double-entry via JournalEntry + validateEntry + Ledger.apply, audit-hashed ledgers, canon citations. Provides /ledger-* skills and slash commands.

entry.title: onepg
entry.content: YAML resume builder with auto-fit PDF rendering

entry.title: arkive
entry.content: A living architecture document for AI-built projects. Your AI agent maintains it; you understand what was built.

entry.title: llm-externalizer
entry.content: MCP server that offloads bounded LLM tasks from Claude Code to cheaper local (LM Studio, Ollama, vLLM, llama.cpp) or remote (OpenRouter) models. Profile-based configuration with ensemble mode.

entry.title: wordpress-expert
entry.content: Expert WordPress diagnostics and site builder: structured investigations with intake questioning, site reconnaissance, parallel execution, findings verification, WordPress site generation as Local WP importable zips, and interactive modification sessions.

entry.title: autonomous
entry.content: Keep an autonomous mission running across turns. A startup capability probe decides whether keep-alive machinery is needed: a cron heartbeat with exponential backoff, auto-stop, and wake/restore for an interactive session; nothing for a persistent process. The rover plugin's decision framework calls this layer at dispatch.

entry.title: aigentry-devkit
entry.content: AI development environment kit: skills, hooks, MCP servers, and HUD for Claude Code and Codex CLI

entry.title: attest
entry.content: Verifies a subagent's Status: DONE / ## Handoff claim against the real git working-tree delta and blocks a DONE whose claimed files never landed. Deterministic, zero-LLM, fail-open.

entry.title: aiad-sdd
entry.content: AIAD SDD Mode — Spec Driven Development pour Claude Code : cycle Intent → Research → SPEC → Gate → Exec → Validate → Drift-Lock, gouvernance Tier 1 enforced, verdicts déterministes.

entry.title: session-sync
entry.content: Sync Claude Code conversations to Effective sessions

entry.title: claude-vault
entry.content: Secure secrets handling for Claude Code - run API calls without exposing keys in session logs

entry.title: swarp
entry.content: Agent orchestration platform — deploy remote Claude agents

entry.title: claude-next-idle
entry.content: Detects idle Claude sessions for keyboard-shortcut cycling

entry.title: how-plugins-work
entry.content: Reference for plugin naming, skill resolution, Claude/Codex adapter sync, marketplace aliases, runtime caches, and plugin:skill invocation.

entry.title: service-knowledge-contour
entry.content: Maintain a minimal service knowledge contour with canonical docs, generated overlays, audits, promotion, and pruning.

entry.title: mitm
entry.content: Interactive MITM proxy with rule engine, traffic inspection, and request/response transforms

entry.title: tink
entry.content: A small harness layer for Claude Code and Codex.

entry.title: vsdd-factory
entry.content: Verified Spec-Driven Development (VSDD) dark factory for software — full SDLC pipeline: brownfield ingest, spec crystallization, story decomposition, TDD delivery, adversarial review, holdout evaluation, formal verification, and release gating.

entry.title: xcindex
entry.content: Query Xcode's pre-built symbol index from Claude Code. Surgical, semantic Swift/ObjC symbol lookups — find references, definitions, overrides, conformances, and blast radius without reading full files.

entry.title: sub-claude
entry.content: Session-oriented pool of persistent Claude TUI slots backed by tmux

entry.title: anger-management
entry.content: Cuss at your coding agent to capture a one-line friction note, then fix the real problem later. The cuss commands (/fuck, /fucking, /fucked, /shit, /crap, /wtf, /bullshit) append one cheap line to a global log and move on; safeword commands (/safeword, /pineapple, /pineapplejuice, /pinapplejuice, /flugelhorn, /banana) interrupt current work and fix one visible friction point now without logging it for later. /anger-management:repair cools down (~22 min, a background headless agent investigates), reads the full capture history, scores confidence, chooses the mitigation layer and target scope, and only applies or routes a fix when confidence is high enough. Lower-confidence findings leave the breadcrumb trail open for a future pass. Modelled on Stripe's bad-day button, course-correction-before-escalation, and the constructed-emotion view of anger; sometimes the irritation is real, sometimes it is playful. Vocabulary avoids slurs and identity-targeted abuse. State is stored locally; the optional background investigation uses the configured runner.

entry.title: memory-rlm
entry.content: Persistent project memory for Claude Code

entry.title: aidlc
entry.content: AWS AI-DLC adaptive workflow as Claude Code slash commands, plus the awslabs AI-DLC rule bundle installer.

entry.title: newsjack
entry.content: Open-source skills that turn your coding agent into a PR operator — strategize positioning, detect newsjackable stories in your space, and react with on-brand pitches and comments.

entry.title: don-cheli-sdd
entry.content: Full SDD (Spec-Driven Development) framework for Claude Code. 72+ slash commands (/dc:*), 14 reusable skills, 15 reasoning models, TDD as an iron law, and i18n support (ES/EN/PT). Turn requirements into tested, documented, production-ready code through 7 disciplined lifecycle phases.

entry.title: draft
entry.content: Context-Driven Development: draft specs and plans before implementation. Structured workflows for features and fixes.

entry.title: clipboard
entry.content: Copy core content of the last answer to the macOS clipboard via the clipboard-copy helper (pbcopy for plain, pbcopy-html for Slack rich text).

entry.title: rover
entry.content: Dispatch a rover at a task and stay back while it decides in the field: a SURVEY/DRIVE/INSPECT/STOW phase machine with a decide framework, pride and trim quality gates, verify evidence discipline, prepare for queuing missions across repos, and a stop communique. Asks the autonomous layer at startup whether it needs to keep itself alive. Depends on gurus for the INSPECT panel review.

entry.title: apartment-finder
entry.content: Multi-agent apartment search: a main-context orchestrator fans out parallel profiler subagents that score listings against a weighted preference profile, with a deterministic floor for acoustics/HVAC, geo-noise, flood risk, and cost.

entry.title: wsl-ssh-agent
entry.content: Bridges Windows SSH agent to WSL for SSH/SCP/Git operations. Works with 1Password, native Windows OpenSSH agent, and other SSH agent implementations.

entry.title: ruler-engine
entry.content: Pluggable rule-injection engine: loads .claude-rules/ruler.yml from target project and injects rules via UserPromptSubmit / PreToolUse hooks. Engine-only, zero business rules.

entry.title: perfect-skill-suggester
entry.content: High-accuracy skill activation (88%+) with Dewey-like domain classification, dynamic tool catalog from skill index, weighted scoring, and three-tier confidence routing.

entry.title: obsreview
entry.content: Interactive review UI for Claude Code hooks with plan review, Obsidian write interception, and markdown annotation.

entry.title: andd-baay
entry.content: Plateforme web de gestion agricole collaborative pour exploitations sahéliennes

entry.title: compare-figma-to-impl
entry.content: Systematically compare a live Firefox UI element against a Figma design, producing a structured report with side-by-side screenshots and discrepancy analysis.

entry.title: token-reporter
entry.content: Per-operation token usage reporter for Claude Code 2.1.108+. Shows token counts, cost estimates, tool + skill + agent attribution, cache invalidation detection, worktree sub-agent breakdown, compact_boundary markers, CLAUDE.md reload events, and file activity when agents complete. Only outputs in debug mode (claude --debug).

entry.title: hydra-package-gate
entry.content: Advisory PreToolUse gate on package install commands. Surfaces 5 supply-chain risk signals (existence, age, maintainer, typosquat, download-cliff) before npm/pip/etc. install runs. Always exit 0; never blocks.

entry.title: gurus
entry.content: Opinionated review panels that challenge code, decisions, and prose from multiple perspectives. Ships gurus:software, gurus:council, gurus:writers, and the gurus:gurus orchestrator; Claude also receives the gurus:sonnet-max panel subagent.

entry.title: rpi-kit
entry.content: Research → Plan → Implement. 7-phase pipeline with 13 named agents, delta specs, party mode, and knowledge compounding.

entry.title: autopilot-codex
entry.content: Codex-as-Manager autopilot for Claude Code: OpenAI Codex (gpt-5.4/5.5) decomposes goals, reviews diffs, and directs the loop; Claude Code implements. Works with ChatGPT subscription via codex login (no OPENAI_API_KEY required).

entry.title: digital-brain
entry.content: Claude + Obsidian knowledge companion. Sets up a persistent, compounding wiki vault. Covers memory management, session notetaking, knowledge organization, and agent context across projects. Based on Andrej Karpathy's LLM Wiki pattern.

entry.title: railgun
entry.content: LLM protection hook - blocks secrets, dangerous commands, and data exfiltration

entry.title: metaswarm
entry.content: Multi-agent orchestration framework for Claude Code, Gemini CLI, and Codex CLI — 19 agents, 14 skills, 16 commands, quality gates, TDD enforcement

entry.title: dobeutech-claude-code-custom
entry.content: Comprehensive centralized repository of Claude Code configurations including agents, skills, commands, hooks, and MCP servers optimized for full-stack development

entry.title: atelier
entry.content: Universal multi-agent project harness for Claude Code. Run any project — web, data, ML, fintech, CLI — through a structured AI team with rigorous governance, from discovery to release: 8 default agents + project-specific implementers, 11 user skills, 12 hooks across 7 events, 6 hard-enforced gates, GitHub + GitLab forge adapters, machine-readable status JSON, atelier-migrate for safe upgrades, atelier-on-atelier dogfood, and a 3-tier change policy.

entry.title: security-review-commons
entry.content: Portable security review hooks backed by deterministic review, checkpoint review, and auditable findings.

entry.title: yt-is
entry.content: YouTube channel tracking and transcript analysis pipeline

entry.title: example-code-extras
entry.content: Claude Code specific plugin with hooks, monitors and helper scripts.

entry.title: house-rules
entry.content: An opinionated baseline for software craft: naming, testing, and programming doctrine in the tradition of Beck, Martin, and Fowler. These are chosen conventions among defensible options, not universal law. Skills: programming-philosophy, testing-philosophy, naming-is-hard.

entry.title: bully
entry.content: Hybrid agent-harness sensor for Claude Code. Computational + inferential rule lanes, subagent context firewall, scoped feedforward, session-aware verification.

entry.title: open-cockpit
entry.content: Session intention tracking — PID mapping, intention file intro, and change notifications for the Open Cockpit app

entry.title: emet
entry.content: Grounded web research MCP plugin for Claude Code with cited answers and live documentation lookup.

entry.title: ecc
entry.content: Harness-native ECC plugin for engineering teams - 67 agents, 270 skills, 92 legacy command shims, reusable hooks, rules, MCP conventions, and operator workflows for Claude Code plus adjacent agent harnesses

entry.title: ecc
entry.content: Harness-native ECC plugin for engineering teams - 67 agents, 277 skills, 93 legacy command shims, reusable hooks, rules, MCP conventions, and operator workflows for Claude Code plus adjacent agent harnesses

entry.title: agentsys
entry.content: Professional-grade slash commands for Claude Code with cross-platform support

entry.title: command-codex-plan
entry.content: Create a detailed implementation plan using Codex 5.2 with high reasoning.

entry.title: agent-mermaid-diagram-specialist
entry.content: Mermaid diagram specialist for creating flowcharts, sequence diagrams, ERDs, and architecture visualizations.

entry.title: crafting-effective-readmes
entry.content: Use when writing or improving README files. Provides templates and guidance matched to your audience and project type.

entry.title: c4-architecture
entry.content: Generate architecture documentation using C4 model Mermaid diagrams. Use when asked to create architecture diagrams, document system architecture, visualize software structure.

entry.title: scholaraio
entry.content: Academic research terminal for Claude Code — search, read, and analyze papers from your local knowledge base while coding. 26 skills: literature search (keyword/semantic/fusion), paper reading (L1-L4), ingestion pipeline, topic modeling, citation graphs, workspace management, BibTeX export, academic writing assistance, and more. Requires Python 3.10+ and pip install.

entry.title: agent-ascii-ui-mockup-generator
entry.content: Visualize UI concepts through ASCII mockups before implementation. Creates multiple ASCII mockup variations for dashboard layouts, forms, and other UI components.

entry.title: design-system-starter
entry.content: Create and evolve design systems with design tokens, component architecture, accessibility guidelines, and documentation templates.

entry.title: frontend-to-backend-requirements
entry.content: Document frontend data needs for backend developers. Use when frontend needs to communicate API requirements to backend.

entry.title: oh-my-claudecode
entry.content: Multi-agent orchestration system for Claude Code

entry.title: professional-communication
entry.content: Guide technical communication for software developers. Covers email structure, team messaging etiquette, meeting agendas, and adapting messages for technical vs non-technical audiences.

entry.title: meme-factory
entry.content: Generate memes using the memegen.link API. Use when users request memes, want to add humor to content, or need visual aids for social media.

entry.title: command-explain-changes-mental-model
entry.content: Build a mental model of changes by splitting them into smaller logical chunks.

entry.title: lesson-learned
entry.content: Analyze recent code changes via git history and extract software engineering lessons. Use when reflecting on work or asking 'what is the lesson here?'

entry.title: excalidraw
entry.content: Use when working with *.excalidraw or *.excalidraw.json files, user mentions diagrams/flowcharts, or requests architecture visualization.

entry.title: mcp-search-console
entry.content: Connect Google Search Console to Claude Code. Query SEO data, inspect URLs, audit indexing, and identify content opportunities through natural language.

entry.title: marp-slide
entry.content: Create professional Marp presentation slides with 7 beautiful themes. Use when users request slide creation, presentations, or Marp documents.

entry.title: reducing-entropy
entry.content: Manual-only skill for minimizing total codebase size. Only activate when explicitly requested. Measures success by final code amount.

entry.title: feedback-mastery
entry.content: Navigate difficult conversations and deliver constructive feedback using structured frameworks. Covers the Preparation-Delivery-Follow-up model and Situation-Behavior-Impact (SBI) technique.

entry.title: eri-rpg
entry.content: Spec-driven development framework with verification for Claude Code

entry.title: aigroup-workflow
entry.content: AI team workflow harness for Claude Code — specialist agents, shared skills, slash commands, hooks, and staged delegation pipeline.

entry.title: fray
entry.content: Orchestrator-first methodology for driving multi-effort pushes through individually-dispatched background sub-agents — a per-project .fray/ thread board, dispatch/reconciliation hooks, and a board/validator CLI. Dormant until you run /fray in a repo.

entry.title: opik
entry.content: LLM observability tooling for agent development and Claude Code

entry.title: cognigy
entry.content: NiCE Cognigy Plugin — create, test, and manage AI Agents on the NiCE Cognigy platform

entry.title: claude-memory
entry.content: Long-term memory for Claude Code. Recalls architecture, conventions, and decisions across sessions, plus an episodic observation log of what happened — so Claude explains your codebase without file traversal, follows your patterns, learns from corrections, and never re-asks what it already learned.

entry.title: cloudfleet
entry.content: Claude Code plugin by Cloudfleet — operate Cloudfleet Kubernetes Engine (CFKE) and Cloudfleet Container Registry (CFCR) with guided workflows, debugging aids, and preconfigured MCP access.

entry.title: optimal-cli
entry.content: Unified CLI skills for Optimal's financial analytics, content marketing, and infrastructure operations.

entry.title: clover
entry.content: Protect your coding agent experience — Clover silently threat-models every plan, surfaces missing security requirements, and folds them in before code is written.

entry.title: slop-gate
entry.content: Claude Code hook plugin that detects likely drift from user intent and forces reflection before continuing.

entry.title: claude-cdp-debugger
entry.content: Live-debug Node.js services via Chrome DevTools Protocol — Claude attaches, sets breakpoints, inspects runtime state, and reports findings conversationally.

entry.title: team-skills-platform
entry.content: Role-based Team Skills platform with an ECC-style harness skeleton, specialist agents, layered rules, commands, hooks skeleton, and frontend governance.

entry.title: caspar
entry.content: Contract-driven agentic coding workflow. caspar guides you through Scope, Plan, Execute, Clean, Test, Rebase, and Learn flows.

entry.title: clickeon-skills
entry.content: Vault search + read (Priority #1) and skill catalog discovery (Priority #2). Requires a gateway key from Daniel — prompted once on install.

entry.title: ripple
entry.content: Agent video editing: transcription-driven cuts, frame-sheet eyes, HDR-safe finishing, deterministic QA, and a persistent taste memory (VIDEO.md). Routes motion graphics to HyperFrames or Remotion.

entry.title: coreviz
entry.content: AI-powered visual asset management for Claude Code. Search, tag, analyze, edit, and organize your media library using natural language.

entry.title: vibemission
entry.content: AI로 코딩하는 과정을 기록해 점수·등급·전세계 랭킹 카드를 만들어 줍니다. 의존성 없음(node만 필요).

entry.title: dtc-copywriting-skills
entry.content: Stefan Georgi's RMBC methodology — 44 agent skills for direct response copywriting

entry.title: remembrance-field
entry.content: Remembrance Field Goggles — the standing coding overlay (FOCUS structure + META resonance + every relevant ecosystem function), plus the seams/gaps wiring commands and the Remembrance Oracle MCP field server. Install once and the ecosystem becomes the default: the goggles are the main tool, active whenever you code.

entry.title: flow
entry.content: A cross-tool agentic-coding workflow toolkit: 11 workflow skills (research / plan / implement / validate / commit / describe-pr / handle-pr-feedback / handoffs), an optional cross-vendor code-review skill, an LLM-as-judge evaluation skill, and a tracker abstraction (GitHub Issues, Azure DevOps work items, ...). Built on the Agent Skills open standard so the same files work in Claude Code and GitHub Copilot CLI.

entry.title: conductor
entry.content: Create, run, monitor, and manage Conductor workflows and tasks

entry.title: cf-powers
entry.content: Skills plugin for Claude Code: analysis, TDD, debugging, and structured workflows

entry.title: crabeye-mcp-bridge
entry.content: One MCP connection for all your tools — with discovery, namespacing, and execution policies.

entry.title: teammcp
entry.content: Universal multi-agent collaboration framework — channels, DMs, tasks, state, inbox

entry.title: drover
entry.content: Automated Drupal and WordPress error monitoring and self-healing pipeline: watches logs (DDEV + Acquia), triages errors into curated Beads tickets, autonomously implements fixes in isolated git worktrees, captures verified Actual solutions alongside Projected hypotheses, and surfaces past fixes via /drover:recall.

entry.title: ui-ux-pro-max
entry.content: UI/UX design intelligence. 84 styles, 161 palettes, 73 font pairings, 25 charts, 17 stacks (React, Next.js, Vue, Nuxt.js, Nuxt UI, Svelte, Astro, SwiftUI, React Native, Flutter, Tailwind, shadcn/ui, Jetpack Compose, Angular, Laravel, JavaFX, Three.js). Actions: plan, build, create, design, implement, review, fix, improve, optimize, enhance, refactor, check UI/UX code. Projects: website, landing page, dashboard, admin panel, e-commerce, SaaS, portfolio, blog, mobile app. Elements: button, modal, navbar, sidebar, card, table, form, chart. Styles: glassmorphism, claymorphism, minimalism, brutalism, neumorphism, bento grid, dark mode, responsive, skeuomorphism, flat design. Topics: color palette, accessibility, animation, layout, typography, font pairing, spacing, hover, shadow, gradient.

entry.title: web-to-markdown
entry.content: Converts webpage URLs to clean Markdown by calling the local web2md CLI (Puppeteer + Readability), suitable for JS-rendered pages.

entry.title: datadog-cli
entry.content: Datadog CLI for searching logs, querying metrics, tracing requests, and managing dashboards. Use when debugging production issues or working with Datadog observability.

entry.title: react-useeffect
entry.content: React useEffect best practices from official docs. Use when writing/reviewing useEffect, useState for derived values, data fetching, or state synchronization. Teaches when NOT to use Effect and better alternatives.

entry.title: code-review
entry.content: Automated code review for pull requests using multiple specialized agents with confidence-based scoring

entry.title: biorxiv
entry.content: Access to bioRxiv and medRxiv preprint data. The bioRxiv Connector gives Claude access to bioRxiv and medRxiv preprint servers, hosting research papers in biological and medical sciences posted before peer review.

entry.title: claude-code-setup
entry.content: Analyze codebases and recommend tailored Claude Code automations such as hooks, skills, MCP servers, and subagents.

entry.title: signalos
entry.content: SignalOS — Product Operating System. Governance-first delivery operating system with gated waves, trust tiers, validators, and audit trail.

entry.title: learning-output-style
entry.content: Interactive learning mode that requests meaningful code contributions at decision points (mimics the unshipped Learning output style)

entry.title: open-targets
entry.content: Drug target discovery and prioritisation platform. The Open Targets Platform is a comprehensive tool that supports systematic identification and prioritisation of potential therapeutic drug targets, integrating publicly available datasets to build and score target-disease associations.

entry.title: ruby-lsp
entry.content: Ruby language server for code intelligence and analysis

entry.title: design-systems
entry.content: Build, document, and maintain scalable design systems — from tokens and components to accessibility and theming.

entry.title: ux-strategy
entry.content: Shape product direction through competitive analysis, design principles, experience mapping, and strategic alignment.

entry.title: adisinsight
entry.content: AdisInsight MCP server by Springer Nature for drug development pipeline, clinical trials, and deals intelligence

entry.title: plugin-dev
entry.content: Plugin development toolkit with skills for creating agents, commands, hooks, MCP integrations, and comprehensive plugin structure guidance

entry.title: pr-review-toolkit
entry.content: Comprehensive PR review agents specializing in comments, tests, error handling, type design, code quality, and code simplification

entry.title: gitlab
entry.content: GitLab DevOps platform integration. Manage repositories, merge requests, CI/CD pipelines, issues, and wikis. Full access to GitLab's comprehensive DevOps lifecycle tools.

entry.title: swift-lsp
entry.content: Swift language server (SourceKit-LSP) for code intelligence

entry.title: gopls-lsp
entry.content: Go language server for code intelligence and refactoring

entry.title: firebase
entry.content: Google Firebase MCP integration. Manage Firestore databases, authentication, cloud functions, hosting, and storage. Build and manage your Firebase backend directly from your development workflow.

entry.title: terraform
entry.content: The Terraform MCP Server provides seamless integration with Terraform ecosystem, enabling advanced automation and interaction capabilities for Infrastructure as Code (IaC) development.

entry.title: pubmed
entry.content: PubMed MCP server for searching biomedical literature and research articles

entry.title: pm-cs
entry.content: Customer Success skills: Customer Health Scorecard, QBR Deck, Escalation Brief, Churn Analysis. Score account health with a weighted RAG framework, build structured QBR decks with value narratives, write crisp escalation briefs for at-risk accounts, and analyse churn by category and segment with prioritised interventions.

entry.title: knowbe4
entry.content: Claude plugins for KnowBe4 - security awareness training, phishing simulation, user risk management

entry.title: agentguard
entry.content: Dense orchestration diagnostics for Claude Code sessions and traces

entry.title: mcp-debugger
entry.content: Multi-language debugging plugin for Claude Code using Debug Adapter Protocol. Debug JavaScript/TypeScript, Python, Go, and Rust with real breakpoints, stepping, and variable inspection.

entry.title: neostack-connect
entry.content: Connect Claude Code to a running NeoStackAI Unreal editor session.

entry.title: telegram-sessions
entry.content: Multi-session Telegram channel for Claude Code — daemon-based architecture with session routing, /new, /sessions, /kill commands from Telegram.

entry.title: skills-ontology
entry.content: Intelligent skill management and retrieval for Claude Code

entry.title: tool-usage-tracker
entry.content: Log Skill, Agent, and slash-command invocations to a local JSONL file and report on usage over time.

entry.title: synaxi-predict
entry.content: Predicts cost, turns, and pass rate for Claude Code tasks before they run

entry.title: realm
entry.content: Obsidian project-knowledge pipeline. Six-skill system: realm-forge (bootstrap), realm-phase (scan+stage), realm-manifest (write), realm-flourish (incremental update), realm-convey (conversation capture), realm-recall (query). Dry-run safety boundary before vault writes. realm-convey bridges conversation context into the pipeline via user-selected topic routing.

entry.title: agent-learning-compounder
entry.content: Distills repo facts, session telemetry, and skill-health signals into durable, evidence-backed agent memory.
